name: Garamararamararaman dan Madudungdung tak tuntung perkuntung
short_name: Karama La Lara Madung Dan Madongdong Tung Tung Tung Furton Tung
lore:
Lore of Garamararamararaman dan Madudungdung tak tuntung perkuntung
                                    


This character embodies a unique combination of a person's facial features and feet, represented within the intriguing context of the salt and honey duality. The salt container is referred to as karamarahman, while the honey container is known as Madungdong. Notably, this character is said to emerge predominantly during the Ramadan season. Historically, they were once close companions who shared a bond through song, harmonizing about 'salt and honey,' until their friendship soured and transformed into animosity. This character hails from Indonesia, alongside another character, Tungung Tung Tung Tung Tung Hur.
Garamararamararaman dan Madudungdung tak tuntung perkuntung is an anthropomorphized figure inspired by Italian Brainrot culture, consisting of two distinct entities: a salt shaker and a honey jar, each adorned with human-like faces and hairy human-like legs. The name derives from the Indonesian words for salt, "garam," and honey, "madu." Additionally, the concluding line of the text connects to a popular Indonesian song by Raykilla titled Garam & Madu, which resonates with the theme of this character's playful absurdity.
Interestingly, the names Garam and Madun serve as playful allusions to prominent figures in contemporary culture, with Garam representing Elon Musk and Madun symbolizing Donald Trump. Observing the facial features of these characters may provide further insight into this entertaining comparison!
Description original text
Indonesian: Garamaraman dan Madudungdung tak tuntung perkuntung, anomali yang mengerkan ucul pada bulan puasa. dia hanya seorang biasa dulunya namun, karena sakingnya cintanya dengan lagu garam dan madu, dia dikutuk seperti ini dan, kalau ada orang yang memutar lagu garam dan madu jam 12 malam, dia akan ditangi oleh dia.
"malam terus terasa sepi, tak mau sendiri"
English: Garamaraman and Madudungdung, who normally do not cause trouble, experienced a terrible anomaly during Ramadan. They were just ordinary people before, but because of their intense love for the song "Garam dan Madu," they were cursed in this way. Now, if someone plays the song "Garam dan Madu" at midnight, they will be haunted by them.
"The night always feels lonely, I don't want to be alone."
